synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-1834 Oracle Linux 10 libnbd bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1834
description:
[1.22.2-3]
- Fix unsanitized hostnames in nbd+ssh URIs allow remote execution
  resolves: RHEL-129311
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1834

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-1834.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libnbd-1.22.2-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
libnbd-bash-completion-1.22.2-3.el10_1.noarch.rpm
libnbd-devel-1.22.2-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
nbdfuse-1.22.2-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
ocaml-libnbd-1.22.2-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
ocaml-libnbd-devel-1.22.2-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
python3-libnbd-1.22.2-3.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
libnbd-1.22.2-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
libnbd-bash-completion-1.22.2-3.el10_1.noarch.rpm
libnbd-devel-1.22.2-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
nbdfuse-1.22.2-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
ocaml-libnbd-1.22.2-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
ocaml-libnbd-devel-1.22.2-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
python3-libnbd-1.22.2-3.el10_1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/libnbd-1.22.2-3.el10_1.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.22.2-3]
- Fix unsanitized hostnames in nbd+ssh URIs allow remote execution
  resolves: RHEL-129311
